w_state_4q.note: Re-transpiled W-state 4q on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

ghz_4q.note: Re-transpiled GHZ 4q on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

product_plus_4q.note: Re-transpiled |+>^4 on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

bell_2q.note: Re-transpiled Bell 2q on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

note: 4q layouts are re-transpiled with optimization_level=1 (same as original runs). Physical mapping is deterministic for a given backend calibration but may shift between calibration cycles. The 8q layout is from the original run.
